title: Canvas

messages.gptImagePermissionRequired: You must enable gpt-image-1 model permissions to use this feature!

deleteDialog.title: Delete Canvas
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this Canvas? This action cannot be undone.

inpaint.title: Touch Edit
inpaint.touchInstructions: Click an element in the image to select it. Drag the selection to reposition. Then describe the edit.
inpaint.dragInstructions: Drag to draw a selection on the image. Then describe the edit.
inpaint.dragToSelect: Drag on the image to select a region
inpaint.noSelection: No region selected — whole image will be edited
inpaint.placeholder: e.g., change the cat to a dog, add a hat, remove the object...
inpaint.elementPlaceholder: e.g., change the cat to a dog, add a hat, remove the object...
inpaint.textPlaceholder: e.g., replace text with "Hello World", change font color to red...

mockup.title: Mockup / Sticker
mockup.noDesignImages: No other images on the canvas. Add a logo or sticker first.

workMode.talkDesc: Describe your design needs in natural language
workMode.tabDesc: Click to select and edit canvas elements

smartLayers.title: Smart Layers
smartLayers.empty: No layers detected. Generate an image to auto-extract layers.
smartLayers.hint: Click layer to edit. Toggle visibility to isolate.

campaignSuite.title: Campaign Suite
campaignSuite.subtitle: Auto-extend to every touchpoint
campaignSuite.hint: Click a platform to generate adapted creative. Brand colors and fonts will be applied automatically.

history.title: History Snapshots
history.empty: No snapshots yet. Each generation creates a restorable snapshot.

selectAFolderDescription: Select a folder to view its images and videos
noMediaFilesDescription: No images or videos in this folder
